sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ وَلَدٌ اسْمُهُ طَارِقٌ مَعَ أَبِيهِ إِلَى الْمَزْرَعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Dječak po imenu Tariq otišao je sa ocem na farmu.
sentences.translationEn: A boy named Tariq went with his father to the farm.

sentences.arabic: رَأَى الأَبْقَارَ وَالأَغْنَامَ لِأَوَّلِ مَرَّةٍ فِي حَيَاتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Po prvi put u životu je vidio krave i ovce.
sentences.translationEn: He saw cows and sheep for the first time in his life.

sentences.arabic: أَرَادَ أَنْ يَلْمِسَ الْبَقَرَةَ فَخَافَ قَلِيلًا.
sentences.translation: Htio je dotaknuti kravu ali se malo bojao.
sentences.translationEn: He wanted to touch the cow but was a little afraid.

sentences.translation: Otac ga je ohrabrio pa ju je nježno dotaknuo i nasmijao se.
sentences.translationEn: His father encouraged him so he touched it gently and laughed.
